name: deputy
description: Reads Deputy locations, employees, departments, timesheets, tasks, leave, rosters, webhooks, and teams, and writes department/leave/roster/webhook/team mutations, through the Deputy REST API (full refresh).

risk.read: external Deputy API read of workforce scheduling, employee, timesheet, leave, and roster data
risk.write: external mutation of departments, leave requests (approval status), rosters/shifts (may notify employees), webhook subscriptions, and teams; approval required
